General.Name: Gemdale Properties and Investment Corp Ltd
General.Description: Gemdale Properties and Investment Corporation Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property investment, development, and management activities in Mainland China. It operates through Property Development, Property Investment and Management, and Corporate and Other segments. The company develops and sells residential and commercial properties; and invests in and manages business parks and commercial properties, as well as offers financial services to property buyers and small businesses. The company was formerly known as Frasers Property (China) Limited and changed its name to Gemdale Properties and Investment Corporation Limited in March 2013. Gemdale Properties and Investment Corporation Limited was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Lee Garden Six, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
